tool_args.label: 16% increase in Paratransit trip demand
tool_args.raw_text: Over the past 12 months, Paratransit Access-A-Ride has seen a 16% increase in customer trip demand, with peak weekdays having over 34,000 scheduled trips, exceeding pre-pandemic levels.

tool_args.label: 34,000+ scheduled trips on peak weekdays
tool_args.raw_text: Over the past 12 months, Paratransit Access-A-Ride has seen a 16% increase in customer trip demand, with peak weekdays having over 34,000 scheduled trips, exceeding pre-pandemic levels.

payload.raw_value_text: peak weekdays having over 34,000 scheduled trips

tool_args.label: 7% increase in telephone requests
tool_args.raw_text: In fact, despite a 7% increase in telephone requests for trip reservations, customers calls were answered 69% faster and customer call abandonment fell by an astounding 71%!

payload.raw_value_text: 7% increase in telephone requests for trip reservations

tool_args.label: 69% faster call answer speed
tool_args.raw_text: In fact, despite a 7% increase in telephone requests for trip reservations, customers calls were answered 69% faster and customer call abandonment fell by an astounding 71%!

tool_args.label: 71% reduction in call abandonment
tool_args.raw_text: In fact, despite a 7% increase in telephone requests for trip reservations, customers calls were answered 69% faster and customer call abandonment fell by an astounding 71%!

payload.raw_value_text: customer call abandonment fell by an astounding 71%

tool_args.label: 30% of underperforming routes improved
tool_args.raw_text: the team undertook several actions that are showing results. Improvements are being realized in key metrics: Customer Journey Time, Customer Satisfaction, Wait Assessment, Service Delivery, and Bus Bunching. As a result, 30% of the routes have been removed from the 'underperforming list' and no longer considered underperforming.

payload.raw_value_text: 30% of the routes have been removed from the 'underperforming list'
payload.scope: Buses lowest performing 29 routes improvement initiative

tool_args.raw_text: Managing and forecasting for 18,911 operating and reimbursable employees located across 28 depots and assets that include 5,795 buses...

tool_args.label: 5,795 buses in Department of Buses
tool_args.raw_text: Managing and forecasting for 18,911 operating and reimbursable employees located across 28 depots and assets that include 5,795 buses, 3 Maintenance Shops...

tool_args.label: New bus radio system over 5,800 buses
tool_args.raw_text: Sam is leading the successful testing and implementation of the new bus radio system that will replace legacy communications in over 5,800 buses, expansion and retrofit of the Automated Bus Lane Enforcement system...

payload.raw_value_text: new bus radio system that will replace legacy communications in over 5,800 buses
payload.scope: NYCT Buses fleet receiving new radio system

tool_args.label: Improving Buses lowest performing 29 routes initiative

payload.claim_text: Catrina was an integral part of the team dedicated to improving Buses' lowest performing 29 routes. Improvements are being realized in key metrics: Customer Journey Time, Customer Satisfaction, Wait Assessment, Service Delivery, and Bus Bunching. As a result, 30% of the routes have been removed from the 'underperforming list'
payload.subject: NYCT Department of Buses

payload.claim_text: Steve Ilardi and Ajay Singh developed a preventative barrier for turnstile back-cocking that mitigates fare evasion at turnstiles across the subway system. The modified turnstile barrier is being rolled out systemwide.
payload.subject: NYCT Department of Subways

tool_args.label: Bus Service Management website designed by Catrina Williams

payload.claim_text: Catrina Williams designed a new Bus Service Management website for Road Operations Management. It is a 'one-stop shop' for Transportation Managers to access Key Performance Indicators, training materials, bus route service management guides and various transportation related forms and information.
payload.subject: NYCT Department of Buses

payload.claim_text: Man-lung Lee and Rasheed Sonson worked as a team to make upgrades to Paratransit's Customer Reservation system, tuning the SQL Database server, adding additional processors, and increasing memory, which improved customer experience and provided annual cost savings.
payload.subject: Paratransit Access-A-Ride

tool_args.label: Samer Ayoub leading bus technology initiatives

payload.claim_text: Samer Ayoub is leading the successful testing and implementation of the new bus radio system that will replace legacy communications in over 5,800 buses, expansion and retrofit of the Automated Bus Lane Enforcement system, increasing Intelligent Vehicle Network storage, and retrofits for the Digital Information System.
payload.subject: NYCT Department of Buses

payload.claim_text: Daniel Chen's Electrical Solutions team has been successful in retrofitting buses with Automatic Passenger Counting (APC) and OMNY fare collection systems. They wrote troubleshooting trees and guidelines for E-mirrors, Hearing Loop, bike rack counters, collision avoidance system and auto park brake feature. The team is supporting the integration of electric buses in the fleet.
payload.subject: NYCT Department of Buses
